description: Pet Project Co-Founder AI is a ChatGPT-based guided market-research tool that helps founders interpret data from third-party research services. The same operator also runs Safe2Sign, a ChatGPT-based contract risk review tool.
summary: petprojectcofounder.ai exposes one public HTTP API with an OpenAPI spec and two public SSE-based MCP servers: the main Pet Project Co-Founder AI server and the Safe2Sign contract-check server.

surfaces.name: Pet Project Co-Founder AI HTTP API
Pet Project Co-Founder AI MCP server
Safe2Sign: Contract Risk Check MCP server
